display.purpose: High-impact card headings and hero titles.

motion.name: tactile-pop
motion.purpose: Floating asset entry and hover reactions.

components.name: Bento Text Panel
components.description: The standardized glassmorphism container for bento grid content.
components.css: .ds-bento-panel { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-radius: 24px; padding: 24px 32px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); max-width: 400px; } .ds-label { color: #ff1574; font-weight: 900; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.2em; display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-heading { color: #ffffff; font-weight: 900; font-size: 32px; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1; margin: 0 0 8px 0; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-body { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; margin: 0; }

components.name: Primary CTA
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #ff1574; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 900; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; padding: 16px 48px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); transform: translateY(-2px); }

narrative.overview: The GamesUp visual system is built for high-octane immersion. It rejects the flat, sterile patterns of corporate e-commerce in favor of cinematic depth, atmospheric textures, and bold structural hierarchy.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Glitch Magenta should occupy ≤10% of any given surface.

dos: Do use full-bleed atmospheric images behind dark overlays
Do keep text panels centered or bottom-aligned
Do use tracking-tighter on all headings
donts: Don't allow PNG assets to overlap main heading text
